input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8856 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-webapp:9.4.0.RC1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is an API drift issue: WebAppClassLoader.Context in 9.4.0.RC1 adds resource visibility methods and uses Class<?> for class visibility checks. Generated or existing tests that implement this interface must match the new signature, but this is test code adaptation rather than workflow setup.
Optional Jetty modules such as jetty-jmx or JSP/Jasper support are not needed for core jetty-webapp coverage unless the generated tests intentionally exercise those optional features.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jetty-webapp 9.4.0.RC1 is usable with its normal transitive Jetty dependencies; meaningful tests can run as an embedded Jetty WebAppContext using temporary files and localhost sockets, with no external service, Docker image, or system property required.
